zh.lifeSummary: Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil是Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael和Havoise de Hédé et Montauban的女兒，出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾。她於1120年11月25日與Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester在法國布列塔尼結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1168年8月31日在英國瓦維其可爾努聶亞頓，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil是Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael和Havoise de Hédé et Montauban的女儿，出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾。她于1120年11月25日与Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester在法国布列塔尼结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1168年8月31日在英国瓦維其可爾努聶亞頓，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Polish   Gawel  . This form of the surname is also found in Slovakia, Czechia, and Germany.
French: metonymic occupational name for a harvester, from javelle, a term for a sheaf of grain which was loosely bound and left on the ground to ripen.

variants.name: Gawel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Janusz, Franciszek, Halina, Jolanta, Lucyna, Ludwik, Tadeusz, Wladyslaw, Zbigniew.

Polish and in some cases probably also Sorbian (Gaweł): from the personal name Gaweł, derived from Latin Gallus (see Gall 3), the name borne by a 7th-century Irish missionary who was very active in central Europe. The extra syllable was introduced by analogy with Latin Paulus, which yielded Polish and (old) Sorbian Paweł. Compare Gavel and Czech Havel .

nameMeanings.name: Amice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval given name derived from Latin ami(ci)tia ‘friendship’ see Amity .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil was born in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France as the daughter of Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael and Havoise de Hédé et Montauban. She married Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester on 25 November 1120, in Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 31 August 1168, in Nuneaton, Warwickshire, England, and was buried in Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil est née à Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, fille de Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael et Havoise de Hédé et Montauban. Elle a épousé Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester le 25 novembre 1120, à Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 août 1168, à Nuneaton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil wurde in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich, als Tochter von Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael und Havoise de Hédé et Montauban geboren. Sie hat am 25. November 1120 in Bretagne, Frankreich Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. August 1168 in Nuneaton, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Leicestershire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester il 25 novembre 1120, nel Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 31 agosto 1168, nel Nuneaton, Warwickshire, England, e fu sepolta a Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuilはフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインガeルでSir Raoul de Montfort GaelとHavoise de Hédé et Montaubanの娘として生まれた。1120年11月25日にフランスブレタグンでRobert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1168年8月31日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアヌネアトンで死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 테 카스틀 비w
ko.lifeSummary: Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil(은)는 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 가e에서 Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael(와)과 Havoise de Hédé et Montauban의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1120년 11월 25일 프랑스 브레타그니에서 Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1168년 8월 31일 영국 워윅실르 누니앳에서 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil nasceu em Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França filha de Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael e Havoise de Hédé et Montauban. Ela casou-se com Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester em 25 de novembro de 1120, em Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1168, em Nuneaton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: лисестир т кастл вию, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil родилась в местности гаeл, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция. Её родителей звали Sir Raoul de Montfort Gael и Havoise de Hédé et Montauban. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Beaumont 2nd Lord of Leicester 25 ноября 1120 г. в местности бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 31 августа 1168 г. в местности нунитон, варвиккшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности лисестиршир, Англия.
